hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "docker-compose"; then docker compose -f ~/llm/ipex-llm/docker-compose.yml config --quiet 2>&1 && echo "✓ docker-compose.yml válido" || echo "✗ ERROR: docker-compose.yml inválido — revisa la sintaxis antes de hacer up"; fi'
